tool_args.label: MTA BUS Underutilization - Females Skilled Craft and Service Maintenance
tool_args.raw_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for females is in the Skilled Craft and Service Maintenance categories. Equipment Maintainer and Bus Operators job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

payload.claim_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for females is in the Skilled Craft and Service Maintenance categories. Equipment Maintainer and Bus Operators job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Underutilization - Minority Males Officials and Skilled Craft
tool_args.raw_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for minority males were in the Officials & Administrators and Skilled Craft categories. Directors and Equipment Maintainer job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

payload.claim_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for minority males were in the Officials & Administrators and Skilled Craft categories. Directors and Equipment Maintainer job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Underutilization - All Females by EEO Category
tool_args.raw_text: Officials & Administrators – Hispanics Professionals – Whites Skilled Craft – Blacks, Hispanics and Whites Service Maintenance – Hispanics and Whites

payload.claim_text: Underrepresentation for all females occurred in: Officials & Administrators – Hispanics; Professionals – Whites; Skilled Craft – Blacks, Hispanics and Whites; Service Maintenance – Hispanics and Whites

tool_args.label: MTA BUS Underutilization - Minority Males by EEO Category
tool_args.raw_text: Officials and Administrators – Blacks and Hispanics Skilled Craft – Hispanics

payload.claim_text: Underrepresentation for minority males occurred in: Officials and Administrators – Blacks and Hispanics; Skilled Craft – Hispanics

tool_args.label: Latinos & Friends Shadow Day Initiative
tool_args.raw_text: Latino's & Friends launched a job shadowing initiative supported by their Executive Sponsors Lisette Camillo and Demetrius Crichlow. The initiative provided employees with a window into career options in the workplace

payload.description: Latinos & Friends launched a job shadowing initiative supported by their Executive Sponsors Lisette Camillo and Demetrius Crichlow, providing employees with a window into career options in the workplace.

tool_args.label: Employee Resource Group Leader Training
tool_args.raw_text: Employee Resource Group Leader Training - July 18, 2023. The ERG Leadership Training centered on developing strong leaders.

payload.description: ERG Leadership Training centered on developing strong leaders, covering leadership skills, alignment of mission/vision/purpose with MTA Strategic Priorities, and tools to measure ERG success.

tool_args.label: Employee Resource Group All Member Meeting Workshop
tool_args.raw_text: Employee Resource Group All Member Meeting Workshop - August 3, 2023. Personal Best: New Year, New You theme for 2023 focused on Emotional Intelligence (E.I.)

payload.description: Personal Best: New Year, New You theme focused on Emotional Intelligence (E.I.), covering The Importance of Emotional Intelligence and best practices for elevating E.I.

tool_args.label: Como Yo - Conversational Spanish Program
tool_args.raw_text: September 15 Como Yo - Fun and exciting free 4-week program for MTA colleagues to connect, learn, and practice conversational Spanish.

payload.description: Fun and exciting free 4-week program for MTA colleagues to connect, learn, and practice conversational Spanish.

tool_args.label: Cafecito Chat with Demetrius Crichlow
tool_args.raw_text: September 21 Cafecito Chat with Demetrius Criclow (virtual) - Latinos & Friends invited Demetrius Crichlow, SVP Subways-NYCT, to a Cafecito chat (an interview)

payload.description: Latinos & Friends invited Demetrius Crichlow, SVP Subways-NYCT, to a Cafecito chat (interview) for MTA employees to learn about his executive role, heritage and professional insight.

tool_args.label: Cafecito Chat with Hugo Pizarro

tool_args.label: Discover Your History Workshop - Latinos and Friends
tool_args.raw_text: October 6 Discover your History by Latinos and Friends (virtual) - This workshop will allow employees to acquire the knowledge and tools to conduct family history research.

payload.description: Workshop allowing employees to acquire knowledge and tools to conduct family history research, focusing on descendants from the Caribbean, Central, South and North America.
